name: Frankfuter Bohnensuppe (Bean Soup with Frankf
recipeInstructions:
Note: Use the real Frankfurters in this recipe and not the hot dogs!
1. Soak beans overnight.
2. In a 3-quart saucepan, bring beans, water, and beef broth to a boil.
3. Cook for about 1 hour.
4. Add carrot and celery; continue cooking for 30 minutes.
5. In a separate frying pan, cook bacon until transparent.
6. Add onions; cook until golden.
7. Mash soup through a sieve or food mill.
8. Return soup to the pan and add the bacon onion mixture, salt, and pepper.
9. Add frankfurters; reheat about 5 minutes.
10. Sprinkle soup with chopped parsley and serve.
